TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Petro_Poroshenko, title = Petro_Poroshenko, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Petro_Poroshenko} }

S.FORM: Petro Poroshenko ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 9, Petro Poroshenko, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1965) mrhuw Ukraine ta' misuw hya' ga Petro Poroshenko, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. His presidential term ended on 20 May 2019.

Petro Poroshenko ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 9, Petro Poroshenko, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1965) mrhuw Ukraine ta' misuw hya' ga Petro Poroshenko, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. His presidential term ended on 20 May 2019.
S.PHON: petro poros~ɕħenko rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, petro poros~ɕħenko, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ukraine taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa petro poros~ɕħenko, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ħis~ɕ pres~ɕi*ential term en*e* on ** maj ****.
